data.content: Branch: worktree-knots-3918-codex-project-skills (commit 5c052a8). Implementation adds .agents/skills as the preferred project-level managed-skill location for Codex, with ~/.codex/skills as user-level fallback. Two changes in src/managed_skills.rs (location_candidates and expected_root_hint), plus test updates and a new lifecycle test in src/managed_skills_tests.rs. make sanity passes at 95.03% coverage.
